title: Senior Radiologist at Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions:
Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre Ventures Solutions!
